name: ptychopetalum olacoides
mechanism: Likely mediated in part by flavonoid/polyphenol antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activity; Alkaloid constituents can modulate neuronal signaling pathways.
contraindications: avoid in patients with hypertension or cardiac issues
safetyNotes: May cause moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician or do not combine with serotonergic drugs or maois without medical guidance. Avoid with high blood pressure; Avoid with hypertension; Avoid in pregnancy; Avoid in patients with hypertension or cardiac issues.
